name: aria-desktop
description: Aria Desktop app assembly and host wrapper over the @aria/desktop shell seam

scripts.dist:mac: bun run build && electron-builder --config ./electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:linux: bun run build && electron-builder --config ./electron-builder.json --linux AppImage zip
scripts.dist:win: bun run build && electron-builder --config ./electron-builder.json --win nsis zip
